历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 7278 → 8645 → 13934 → 18084 → 15562, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8100 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 15562, a rebound from 2024; the university's enrollment plan in Hubei for Physics Category was 9 students in both 2021 and 2022, 6 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 11 students, a 37.5% increase from 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 81st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 81–97 range in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving general management topics such as air conditioning fee disputes, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 49th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; no significant historical record of admission gaps; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's language-oriented characteristics, strongly attracting related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics Category enrollment majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology, Management Science and Engineering, etc., correspond to the Computer/Electronic Information category, which are highly recommended due to social popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 251,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), slightly higher than the 249,800 in 2025, with competition basically flat; Shanghai International Studies University is located in Shanghai, representing a cross-province application for Hubei examinees; the university enrolled 7 students in Hubei in 2021 (accounting for 1.13% of the national total), with limited regional preference data, not included in the main judgment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend of historical rankings, the 37.5% expansion of the Physics Category plan in 2026, and the slight increase in the number of Physics Category examinees in the province, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 15562; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19033, with a range of 18533–19533.
